highlights.text: Serial code SG-007 | TRAGUIN tour code TRG-SIN-MAL-2026
Country: Singapore, Asia | Category: Premium Singapore- Malaysia Combo Family Tour
Destinations: Singapore Highlights • Kuala Lumpur City • Genting Highlands • Batu Caves
Vehicle / Meals: Private Luxury Van / Buffet Breakfast & Curated Dinners

itinerary.title: Singapore & Malaysia Tour
itinerary.overview:
Singapore Highlights • Kuala Lumpur City • Genting Highlands • Batu Caves 05 Nights / 06 Days Classic Singapore & Malaysia Family Expedition SERIAL CODE: SG-007 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-SIN-MAL-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Singapore & Malaysia CATEGORY: Premium Singapore- Malaysia Combo Family Tour DURATION: 05 Nights / 06 Days Singapore (2N) + Malaysia (3N)

TOUR OVERVIEW
Experience the best of two worlds with our TRAGUIN curated Singapore & Malaysia combo. From the modern marvels of Singapore to the iconic landscapes and highland retreats of Malaysia, this family-friendly expedition offers a perfect mix of cultural discovery, sightseeing, and fun, creating unforgettable memories. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Singapore package (SG-007 / TRG-SIN-MAL-2026): Singapore Highlights • Kuala Lumpur City • Genting Highlands • Batu Caves with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: Day 01: ARRIVAL IN SINGAPORE & CITY VISTAS
Day 02: GARDENS BY THE BAY & TRANSFER

days.title: ARRIVAL IN SINGAPORE & CITY VISTAS
days.description: Arrive in Singapore. Private transfer to your premium city hotel. Evening at Marina Bay to witness the spectacular light show.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: GARDENS BY THE BAY & TRANSFER
days.description: Explore the futuristic Gardens by the Bay. Afternoon transfer to Malaysia, enjoying scenic highway views along the way.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: KUALA LUMPUR HIGHLIGHTS
days.description: Tour the iconic Petronas Towers and cultural sites of Kuala Lumpur. Experience the diverse charm of this modern capital.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: BATU CAVES & GENTING HIGHLANDS
days.description: Visit the magnificent Batu Caves. Ascend to Genting Highlands for a day of cool mountain air and family fun, a classic exclusive experience.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: LEISURE & LOCAL EXPLORATION
days.description: A relaxed day in Kuala Lumpur, perfect for final shopping and enjoying local cuisine, creating unforgettable memories.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer to the airport, completing your premium combo expedition.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.
